channel.title: Copilot-Business on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Copilot-Business on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Copilot organization custom instructions are generally available
item.description:
GitHub Copilot organization custom instructions are now generally available. Copilot Business and Copilot Enterprise org admins can set default instructions for their organization.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Claude and Codex now available for Copilot Business & Pro users
item.description:
GitHub Copilot Business and Copilot Pro customers can now use Anthropic Claude and OpenAI Codex as coding agents. Copilot Enterprise and Pro+ customers got access earlier in February 2026.

  • Source: GitHub
